key_modifications: Method visibility changed from private to public
Enhanced javadoc with comprehensive usage documentation
Added example usage code in comments
Clarified purpose as programmatic trigger mechanism

patterns_discovered.description: Uses Android broadcast intents (nlscan.action.SCANNER_TRIG) for inter-component communication with scanner service
Scan results are received via BroadcastReceiver and emitted through SharedFlow for reactive consumption
Manager injected as dependency, indicating service-based architecture
Public API includes comprehensive javadoc with examples and preconditions

gotchas_discovered.description: BroadcastReceiver must be registered via register() before calling triggerScan(), otherwise scan results will not be received
Method depends on Newland scanner service availability; no error handling for missing/unavailable service
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Should be addressed with try-catch or permission checks

approach_outcome.summary: Successfully exposed triggerScan() as public API with enhanced documentation
key_achievements: Changed method from private to public
Added comprehensive javadoc explaining usage, preconditions, and example code
Enabled programmatic barcode scanning from ViewModels and UI components
Documented integration with SharedFlow event emission

recommendations.recommendation: Add try-catch error handling for broadcast sending or service availability checks
recommendations.rationale: Prevents crashes if scanner service is unavailable

recommendations.recommendation: Document required permissions for sending broadcasts (may need BROADCAST_STICKY or similar)
Add unit tests for triggerScan() method to verify intent is sent correctly
recommendations.rationale: Ensures reliability of programmatic trigger mechanism

recommendations.recommendation: Consider adding optional parameters or callback mechanism for scan completion feedback
recommendations.rationale: Would provide more flexible integration patterns

recommendations.recommendation: Consider adding verbose logging for debugging registration and trigger timing issues
recommendations.rationale: Aids troubleshooting when scan results not received
